title: FLEXIBLE SERVICES - 211info
text: JACKSON CARE CONNECT FLEXIBLE SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Flexible Services or "flex funds," are non-covered services offered in addition to the covered benefits of the Oregon Health Plan (OHP) through Coordinated Care Organizations (CCOs) to improve care delivery and overall member health and well-being. Eligibility for services is determined by the CCO. Services can include but are not limited to: -Housing support (rent assistance, rental deposit assistance [requires move-in date], utility bills, housing programs for women and children) -Temporary motel stays (For individuals being discharged from the hospital; experiencing an extreme weather event; has a set move-in date for a new home and needs a temporary place to stay before then; or actively fleeing a domestic violence situation.) -Electronics such as cellphones, computers, and other communication devices -Specific educational materials and/or classes -Family and home resources (ex. items for child health and safety, parenting programs, household appliances, climate devices) -Gym memberships and exercise classes/equipment -Health and substance use prevention support All flexible services are determined on a case-by-case basis by the CCO. HRS are NOT intended to address emergency situations. CCOs are not required to offer flexible services. As flexible services are not a covered benefit, a denial cannot be appealed, but an OHP member can submit a complaint. Eligibility: -Must be a current member of the CCO -Member must be unable to receive requested service by any other benefit or means -Item or service requested must help with medical need or life situation -All documentation requested for service must be provided Health-related services are limited, not immediate, not guaranteed or continuously available, and individuals may not qualify. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm Email (503) 416-4100 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (503) 416-4100 CareOregon Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for information. There is no Oregon Health Authority (OHA) required timeline for CCO review of flexible services requests. Turn around time can take 4 weeks or more once the request is submitted. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Varies by service LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Jackson County Services: Air Conditioners * Medicaid Recipients Cooking Classes * Medicaid Recipients Electric Service Payment Assistance * Medicaid Recipients Fitness Equipment and Accessories * Medicaid Recipients Furniture * Medicaid Recipients Gas Service Payment Assistance * Medicaid Recipients Health Related Temporary Housing * Medicaid Recipients Homeless Motel Vouchers * Medicaid Recipients Internet Service Payment Assistance * Medicaid Recipients Mobile Devices * Medicaid Recipients Rent Payment Assistance * Medicaid Recipients Rental Deposit Assistance * Medicaid Recipients Sewer Service Payment Assistance * Medicaid Recipients Substance Use Disorder Referrals * Medicaid Recipients Telephone Service Payment Assistance * Medicaid Recipients Therapeutic Exercise * Medicaid Recipients Trash/Recycling Service Payment Assistance * Medicaid Recipients Water Service Payment Assistance * Medicaid Recipients Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS NUTRITION SUPPORTS HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - COORDINATED CARE ORGANIZATION HOUSING/SHELTER - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS HOUSING SUPPORTS HOME MODIFICATION HOUSING/SHELTER - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS HOUSING SUPPORTS RENTAL ASSISTANCE MATERIAL GOODS - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS CLIMATE SUPPORTS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
